verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ sunt generationes Aaron et Moysi in die qua locutus est Dominus ad Moysen in monte Sinai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה תּוֹלְדֹ֥ת אַהֲרֹ֖ן וּמֹשֶׁ֑ה בְּי֗וֹם דִּבֶּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֖ה בְּהַ֥ר סִינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: These are the generations of Aaron and Moses in the day that the Lord spoke to Moses in mount Sinai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Aaronin ja Moseksen sukukunnat siihen aikaan koska Herra puhui Mosekselle Sinain vuorella.
verses.king_james: These also are the generations of Aaron and Moses in the day that the Lord spake with Moses in mount Sinai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæc nomina filiorum Aaron : primogenitus ejus Nadab, deinde Abiu, et Eleazar, et Ithamar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה שְׁמ֥וֹת בְּֽנֵי־אַהֲרֹ֖ן הַבְּכֹ֣ר ׀ נָדָ֑ב וַאֲבִיה֕וּא אֶלְעָזָ֖ר וְאִיתָמָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And these the names of the sons of Aaron: his firstborn Nadab, then Abiu, and Eleazar, and Ithamar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät ovat Aaronin poikain nimet: Nadab esikoinen, sitälikin Abihu, Eleatsar ja Itamar.
verses.king_james: And these are the names of the sons of Aaron; Nadab the firstborn, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc nomina filiorum Aaron sacerdotum qui uncti sunt, et quorum repletæ et consecratæ manus ut sacerdotio fungerentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֗לֶּה שְׁמוֹת֙ בְּנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֔ן הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים הַמְּשֻׁחִ֑ים אֲשֶׁר־מִלֵּ֥א יָדָ֖ם לְכַהֵֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: These the names of the sons of Aaron the priests that were anointed, and whose hands were filled and consecrated, to do the functions of priesthood.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Aaronin poikain nimet, jotka olivat papiksi voidellut, ja heidän kätensä täytetyt papin virkaan.
verses.king_james: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the priests which were anointed, whom he consecrated to minister in the priest’s office.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mortui sunt enim Nadab et Abiu cum offerrent ignem alienum in conspectu Domini in deserto Sinai, absque liberis : functique sunt sacerdotio Eleazar et Ithamar coram Aaron patre suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣מׇת נָדָ֣ב וַאֲבִיה֣וּא לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֡ה בְּֽהַקְרִבָם֩ אֵ֨שׁ זָרָ֜ה לִפְנֵ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ בְּמִדְבַּ֣ר סִינַ֔י וּבָנִ֖ים לֹא־הָי֣וּ לָהֶ֑ם וַיְכַהֵ֤ן אֶלְעָזָר֙ וְאִ֣יתָמָ֔ר עַל־פְּנֵ֖י אַהֲרֹ֥ן אֲבִיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Now Nadab and Abiu died, without children, when they offered strange fire before the Lord, in the desert of Sinai: and Eleazar and Ithamar performed the priestly office in the presence of Aaron their father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Nadab ja Abihu kuolivat Herran edessä, koska he uhrasivat vierasta tulta Herran edessä Sinain korvessa, ja ei ollut heillä poikia; mutta Eleatsar ja Itamar tekivät papin virkaa isänsä Aaronin edessä.
verses.king_james: And Nadab and Abihu died before the Lord, when they offered strange fire before the Lord, in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children: and Eleazar and Ithamar ministered in the priest’s office in the sight of Aaron their father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Applica tribum Levi, et fac stare in conspectu Aaron sacerdotis ut ministrent ei, et excubent,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַקְרֵב֙ אֶת־מַטֵּ֣ה לֵוִ֔י וְהַעֲמַדְתָּ֣ אֹת֔וֹ לִפְנֵ֖י אַהֲרֹ֣ן הַכֹּהֵ֑ן וְשֵׁרְת֖וּ אֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Bring the tribe of Levi, and make them stand in the sight of Aaron the priest to minister to him, and let them watch,
verses.finnish_biblia: Tuo edes Levin sukukunta ja aseta heitä papin Aaronin eteen, palvelemaan häntä,
verses.king_james: Bring the tribe of Levi near, and present them before Aaron the priest, that they may minister unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: et observent quidquid ad cultum pertinet multitudinis coram tabernaculo testimonii,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁמְר֣וּ אֶת־מִשְׁמַרְתּ֗וֹ וְאֶת־מִשְׁמֶ֙רֶת֙ כׇּל־הָ֣עֵדָ֔ה לִפְנֵ֖י אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד לַעֲבֹ֖ד אֶת־עֲבֹדַ֥ת הַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And observe whatsoever appertaineth to the service of the multitude before the tabernacle of the testimony,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitämään vaarin hänen vartiostansa ja koko seurakunnan vartiosta, seurakunnan majan edessä, ja palvelemaan majan palveluksessa,
verses.king_james: And they shall keep his charge, and the charge of the whole congregation before the tabernacle of the congregation, to do the service of the tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: et custodiant vasa tabernaculi, servientes in ministerio ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁמְר֗וּ אֶֽת־כׇּל־כְּלֵי֙ אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֔ד וְאֶת־מִשְׁמֶ֖רֶת בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לַעֲבֹ֖ד אֶת־עֲבֹדַ֥ת הַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And let them keep the vessels of the tabernacle, serving in the ministry thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tallella pitämään kaikki seurakunnan majan astiat, ja ottamaan vaarin Israelin lasten vartioitsemisesta, palvelemaan majan palveluksessa.
verses.king_james: And they shall keep all the instruments of the tabernacle of the congregation, and the charge of the children of Israel, to do the service of the tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dabisque dono Levitas
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתָּה֙ אֶת־הַלְוִיִּ֔ם לְאַהֲרֹ֖ן וּלְבָנָ֑יו נְתוּנִ֨ם נְתוּנִ֥ם הֵ֙מָּה֙ ל֔וֹ מֵאֵ֖ת בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt give the Levites for a gift,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinun pitää antaman Aaronille ja hänen pojillensa Leviläiset; he ovat niille lahjaksi annetut Israelin lapsista.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt give the Levites unto Aaron and to his sons: they are wholly given unto him out of the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aaron et filiis ejus, quibus traditi sunt a filiis Israël. Aaron autem et filios ejus constitues super cultum sacerdotii. Externus, qui ad ministrandum accesserit, morietur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־אַהֲרֹ֤ן וְאֶת־בָּנָיו֙ תִּפְקֹ֔ד וְשָׁמְר֖וּ אֶת־כְּהֻנָּתָ֑ם וְהַזָּ֥ר הַקָּרֵ֖ב יוּמָֽת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: To Aaron and to his sons, to whom they are delivered by the children of Israel. But thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons over the service of priesthood. The stranger that approacheth to minister, shall be put to death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Aaronin poikinensa pitää sinun asettaman pitämään vaaria pappeudestansa. Ja jos joku muukalainen siihen lähestyy, sen pitää kuoleman.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons, and they shall wait on their priest’s office: and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego tuli Levitas a filiis Israël pro omni primogenito, qui aperit vulvam in filiis Israël, eruntque Levitæ mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֞י הִנֵּ֧ה לָקַ֣חְתִּי אֶת־הַלְוִיִּ֗ם מִתּוֹךְ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל תַּ֧חַת כׇּל־בְּכ֛וֹר פֶּ֥טֶר רֶ֖חֶם מִבְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְהָ֥יוּ לִ֖י הַלְוִיִּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have taken the Levites from the children of Israel, for every firstborn that openeth the womb among the children of Israel, and the Levites shall be mine.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, minä otin Leviläiset Israelin lapsista kaikkein esikoisten edestä, jotka ensisti äitinsä kohdun avaavat Israelin lasten seassa, niin että Leviläisten pitää oleman minun.
verses.king_james: And I, behold, I have taken the Levites from among the children of Israel instead of all the firstborn that openeth the matrix among the children of Israel: therefore the Levites shall be mine;

verses.latin_vulgate: Meum est enim omne primogenitum : ex quo percussi primogenitos in terra Ægypti, sanctificavi mihi quidquid primum nascitur in Israël : ab homine usque ad pecus, mei sunt. Ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לִי֮ כׇּל־בְּכוֹר֒ בְּיוֹם֩ הַכֹּתִ֨י כׇל־בְּכ֜וֹר בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֗יִם הִקְדַּ֨שְׁתִּי לִ֤י כׇל־בְּכוֹר֙ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מֵאָדָ֖ם עַד־בְּהֵמָ֑ה לִ֥י יִהְי֖וּ אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For every firstborn is mine: since I struck the firstborn in the land of Egypt: I have sanctified to myself whatsoever is firstborn in Israel both of man and beast, they are mine: I am the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kaikki esikoiset ovat minun: sinä päivänä, kuin minä löin kaikki esikoiset Egyptin maalla, pyhitin minä itselleni kaikki esikoiset Israelissa, ihmisistä niin karjaan asti, että ne olisivat minun: Minä Herra.
verses.king_james: Because all the firstborn are mine; for on the day that I smote all the firstborn in the land of Egypt I hallowed unto me all the firstborn in Israel, both man and beast: mine shall they be: I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen in deserto Sinai, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה בְּמִדְבַּ֥ר סִינַ֖י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses in the desert of Sinai, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle Sinain korvessa, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Numera filios Levi per domos patrum suorum et familias, omnem masculum ab uno mense et supra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּקֹד֙ אֶת־בְּנֵ֣י לֵוִ֔י לְבֵ֥ית אֲבֹתָ֖ם לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם כׇּל־זָכָ֛ר מִבֶּן־חֹ֥דֶשׁ וָמַ֖עְלָה תִּפְקְדֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Number the sons of Levi by the houses of their fathers and their families, every male from one month and upward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lue Levin pojat heidän isäinsä huoneen ja sukukuntainsa jälkeen: kaiken miehenpuolen, kuukauden vanhan ja sen ylitse, pitää sinun lukeman.
verses.king_james: Number the children of Levi after the house of their fathers, by their families: every male from a month old and upward shalt thou number them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numeravit Moyses, ut præceperat Dominus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְקֹ֥ד אֹתָ֛ם מֹשֶׁ֖ה עַל־פִּ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר צֻוָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses numbered them as the Lord had commanded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses luki heitä Herran sanan jälkeen, niinkuin hänelle oli käsketty.
verses.king_james: And Moses numbered them according to the word of the Lord, as he was commanded.

verses.latin_vulgate: et inventi sunt filii Levi per nomina sua, Gerson et Caath et Merari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽהְיוּ־אֵ֥לֶּה בְנֵֽי־לֵוִ֖י בִּשְׁמֹתָ֑ם גֵּרְשׁ֕וֹן וּקְהָ֖ת וּמְרָרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were found sons of Levi by their names, Gerson and Caath Merari.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät olivat Levin pojat nimeinsä jälkeen: Gerson, Kahat ja Merari.
verses.king_james: And these were the sons of Levi by their names; Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Gerson : Lebni et Semei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה שְׁמ֥וֹת בְּֽנֵי־גֵרְשׁ֖וֹן לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם לִבְנִ֖י וְשִׁמְעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Gerson: Lebni and Semei.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Gersonin poikain nimet heidän sukukunnissansa olivat Libni ja Simei.
verses.king_james: And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their families; Libni, and Shimei.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Caath : Amram et Jesaar, Hebron et Oziel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י קְהָ֖ת לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם עַמְרָ֣ם וְיִצְהָ֔ר חֶבְר֖וֹן וְעֻזִּיאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Caath: Amram, and Jesaar, Hebron and Oziel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahatin pojat heidän sukukunnissansa: Amram, Jetsehar, Hebron ja Usiel.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Kohath by their families; Amram, and Izehar, Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Merari : Moholi et Musi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֧י מְרָרִ֛י לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֖ם מַחְלִ֣י וּמוּשִׁ֑י אֵ֥לֶּה הֵ֛ם מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ת הַלֵּוִ֖י לְבֵ֥ית אֲבֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Merari, Moholi and Musi.
verses.finnish_biblia: Merarin pojat heidän sukukunnissansa: Maheli ja Musi. Nämät ovat Levin sukukunnat heidän isäinsä huoneen jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Merari by their families; Mahli, and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to the house of their fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: De Gerson fuere familiæ duæ, Lebnitica, et Semeitica :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְגֵ֣רְשׁ֔וֹן מִשְׁפַּ֙חַת֙ הַלִּבְנִ֔י וּמִשְׁפַּ֖חַת הַשִּׁמְעִ֑י אֵ֣לֶּה הֵ֔ם מִשְׁפְּחֹ֖ת הַגֵּרְשֻׁנִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Gerson were two families, the Lebnites, and the Semeites:
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Gersonin sukukunnat: Libniläiset ja Simeiläiset.
verses.king_james: Of Gershon was the family of the Libnites, and the family of the Shimites: these are the families of the Gershonites.

verses.latin_vulgate: quarum numeratus est populus sexus masculini ab uno mense et supra, septem millia quingenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּקֻדֵיהֶם֙ בְּמִסְפַּ֣ר כׇּל־זָכָ֔ר מִבֶּן־חֹ֖דֶשׁ וָמָ֑עְלָה פְּקֻ֣דֵיהֶ֔ם שִׁבְעַ֥ת אֲלָפִ֖ים וַחֲמֵ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of which were numbered, people of the male sex from one month and upward, seven thousand five hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän lukunsa, kaikki miehenpuoli kuukauden vanha ja sen ylitse, ne olivat seitsemäntuhatta ja viisisataa.
verses.king_james: Those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, even those that were numbered of them were seven thousand and five hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi post tabernaculum metabuntur ad occidentem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִשְׁפְּחֹ֖ת הַגֵּרְשֻׁנִּ֑י אַחֲרֵ֧י הַמִּשְׁכָּ֛ן יַחֲנ֖וּ יָֽמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: These shall pitch behind the tabernacle on the west,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Gersonilaisten sukukunnat pitää heitänsä sioittaman takapuolelle majaa, länteen päin.
verses.king_james: The families of the Gershonites shall pitch behind the tabernacle westward.

verses.latin_vulgate: sub principe Eliasaph filio Laël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְשִׂ֥יא בֵֽית־אָ֖ב לַגֵּרְשֻׁנִּ֑י אֶלְיָסָ֖ף בֶּן־לָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Under their prince Eliasaph the son of Lael.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän päämiehensä, pitää oleman Eljasaph Laelin poika.
verses.king_james: And the chief of the house of the father of the Gershonites shall be Eliasaph the son of Lael.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et habebunt excubias in tabernaculo fœderis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִשְׁמֶ֤רֶת בְּנֵֽי־גֵרְשׁוֹן֙ בְּאֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֔ד הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן וְהָאֹ֑הֶל מִכְסֵ֕הוּ וּמָסַ֕ךְ פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their charge shall be in the tabernacle of the covenant:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Gersonin lasten pitää vartioitseman seurakunnan majassa Tabernaklia, ja majaa, peitteitä, ja seurakunnan majan oven vaatteita,
verses.king_james: And the charge of the sons of Gershon in the tabernacle of the congregation shall be the tabernacle, and the tent, the covering thereof, and the hanging for the door of the tabernacle of the congregation,

verses.latin_vulgate: ipsum tabernaculum et operimentum ejus, tentorium quod trahitur ante fores tecti fœderis, et cortinas atrii : tentorium quoque quod appenditur in introitu atrii tabernaculi, et quidquid ad ritum altaris pertinet, funes tabernaculi et omnia utensilia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקַלְעֵ֣י הֶֽחָצֵ֗ר וְאֶת־מָסַךְ֙ פֶּ֣תַח הֶֽחָצֵ֔ר אֲשֶׁ֧ר עַל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֛ן וְעַל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֖חַ סָבִ֑יב וְאֵת֙ מֵֽיתָרָ֔יו לְכֹ֖ל עֲבֹדָתֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The tabernacle itself and the cover thereof, the hanging that is drawn before the doors of the tabernacle of the covenant, and the curtains of the court: the hanging also that is hanged in the entry of the court of the tabernacle, and whatsoever belongeth to the rite of the altar, the cords of the tabernacle, and all the furniture thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pihan vaatteita, ja pihan oven peitettä, joka on Tabernaklin ja alttarin päällä ympäri, ja köysiä ja kaikkia, mitä sen palvelukseen tarvitaan.
verses.king_james: And the hangings of the court, and the curtain for the door of the court, which is by the tabernacle, and by the altar round about, and the cords of it for all the service thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cognatio Caath habebit populos Amramitas et Jesaaritas et Hebronitas et Ozielitas. Hæ sunt familiæ Caathitarum recensitæ per nomina sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִקְהָ֗ת מִשְׁפַּ֤חַת הַֽעַמְרָמִי֙ וּמִשְׁפַּ֣חַת הַיִּצְהָרִ֔י וּמִשְׁפַּ֙חַת֙ הַֽחֶבְרֹנִ֔י וּמִשְׁפַּ֖חַת הָעׇזִּֽיאֵלִ֑י אֵ֥לֶּה הֵ֖ם מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ת הַקְּהָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of the kindred of Caath come the families of the Amramites and Jesaarites and Hebronites and Ozielites. These are the families of the Caathites reckoned up by their names:
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Kahatin sukukunnat: Amramilaiset, Jetseharilaiset, Hebronilaiset ja Usielilaiset:
verses.king_james: And of Kohath was the family of the Amramites, and the family of the Izeharites, and the family of the Hebronites, and the family of the Uzzielites: these are the families of the Kohathites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes generis masculini ab uno mense et supra, octo millia sexcenti habebunt excubias sanctuarii,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּמִסְפַּר֙ כׇּל־זָכָ֔ר מִבֶּן־חֹ֖דֶשׁ וָמָ֑עְלָה שְׁמֹנַ֤ת אֲלָפִים֙ וְשֵׁ֣שׁ מֵא֔וֹת שֹׁמְרֵ֖י מִשְׁמֶ֥רֶת הַקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: All of the male sex from one month and upward, eight thousand six hundred: they shall have the guard of the sanctuary,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki miehenpuoli kuukauden vanhasta ja sen ylitse, lukuansa kahdeksantuhatta ja kuusisataa, joiden pitää pitämän vaarin pyhän vartioitsemisesta,
verses.king_james: In the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were eight thousand and six hundred, keeping the charge of the sanctuary.

verses.latin_vulgate: et castrametabuntur ad meridianam plagam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ת בְּנֵי־קְהָ֖ת יַחֲנ֑וּ עַ֛ל יֶ֥רֶךְ הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן תֵּימָֽנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And shall camp on the south side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää heitänsä sioittaman etelän puolelle, sivulle majaa.
verses.king_james: The families of the sons of Kohath shall pitch on the side of the tabernacle southward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Princepsque eorum erit Elisaphan filius Oziel :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְשִׂ֥יא בֵֽית־אָ֖ב לְמִשְׁפְּחֹ֣ת הַקְּהָתִ֑י אֱלִיצָפָ֖ן בֶּן־עֻזִּיאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their prince shall be Elisaphan the son of Oziel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän päämiehensä pitää oleman Elitsaphan Usielin poika.
verses.king_james: And the chief of the house of the father of the families of the Kohathites shall be Elizaphan the son of Uzziel.

verses.latin_vulgate: et custodient arcam, mensamque et candelabrum, altaria et vasa sanctuarii, in quibus ministratur, et velum, cunctamque hujuscemodi supellectilem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִשְׁמַרְתָּ֗ם הָאָרֹ֤ן וְהַשֻּׁלְחָן֙ וְהַמְּנֹרָ֣ה וְהַֽמִּזְבְּחֹ֔ת וּכְלֵ֣י הַקֹּ֔דֶשׁ אֲשֶׁ֥ר יְשָׁרְת֖וּ בָּהֶ֑ם וְהַ֨מָּסָ֔ךְ וְכֹ֖ל עֲבֹדָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall keep the ark, and the table and the candlestick, the altars, and the vessels of the sanctuary, wherewith they minister, and the veil, and all the furniture of this kind.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän pitää vartoitseman arkkia, pöytää, kynttiläjalkaa, alttareita ja kaikkia pyhän astioita, joilla palvelusta tehdään, ja peitteitä ja kaikkia, mitä palvelukseen tarvitaan.
verses.king_james: And their charge shall be the ark, and the table, and the candlestick, and the altars, and the vessels of the sanctuary wherewith they minister, and the hanging, and all the service thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Princeps autem principum Levitarum Eleazar filius Aaron sacerdotis, erit super excubitores custodiæ sanctuarii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְשִׂיא֙ נְשִׂיאֵ֣י הַלֵּוִ֔י אֶלְעָזָ֖ר בֶּן־אַהֲרֹ֣ן הַכֹּהֵ֑ן פְּקֻדַּ֕ת שֹׁמְרֵ֖י מִשְׁמֶ֥רֶת הַקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the prince of the princes of the Levites, Eleazar, the son of Aaron the priest, shall be over them that watch for the guard of the sanctuary.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kaikkein Levin päämiesten ylimmäinen pitää oleman Eleatsarin papin Aaronin pojan, ylitse niiden, jotka pitävät vaarin pyhän vartioitsemisesta.
verses.king_james: And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be chief over the chief of the Levites, and have the oversight of them that keep the charge of the sanctuary.

verses.latin_vulgate: At vero de Merari erunt populi Moholitæ et Musitæ recensiti per nomina sua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִמְרָרִ֕י מִשְׁפַּ֙חַת֙ הַמַּחְלִ֔י וּמִשְׁפַּ֖חַת הַמּוּשִׁ֑י אֵ֥לֶּה הֵ֖ם מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ת מְרָרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And of Merari are the families of the Moholites, and Musites, reckoned up by their names:
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Merarin sukukunnat: Mahelilaiset ja Musilaiset,
verses.king_james: Of Merari was the family of the Mahlites, and the family of the Mushites: these are the families of Merari.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnes generis masculini ab uno mense et supra, sex millia ducenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפְקֻדֵיהֶם֙ בְּמִסְפַּ֣ר כׇּל־זָכָ֔ר מִבֶּן־חֹ֖דֶשׁ וָמָ֑עְלָה שֵׁ֥שֶׁת אֲלָפִ֖ים וּמָאתָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: All of the male kind from one month and upward, six thousand two hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joiden luku oli kuusituhatta ja kaksisataa, kaikki miehenpuoli, kuukauden vanha ja sen ylitse.
verses.king_james: And those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were six thousand and two hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Princeps eorum Suriel filius Abihaiel : in plaga septentrionali castrametabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְשִׂ֤יא בֵֽית־אָב֙ לְמִשְׁפְּחֹ֣ת מְרָרִ֔י צוּרִיאֵ֖ל בֶּן־אֲבִיחָ֑יִל עַ֣ל יֶ֧רֶךְ הַמִּשְׁכָּ֛ן יַחֲנ֖וּ צָפֹֽנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their prince Suriel the son of Abihaiel: their shall camp on the north side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän päämiehensä pitää oleman Suriel Abihailin poika, ja pitää sioittaman heitänsä sivulle majaa, pohjan puolelle.
verses.king_james: And the chief of the house of the father of the families of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail: these shall pitch on the side of the tabernacle northward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erunt sub custodia eorum tabulæ tabernaculi et vectes, et columnæ ac bases earum, et omnia quæ ad cultum hujuscemodi pertinent :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפְקֻדַּ֣ת מִשְׁמֶ֘רֶת֮ בְּנֵ֣י מְרָרִי֒ קַרְשֵׁי֙ הַמִּשְׁכָּ֔ן וּבְרִיחָ֖יו וְעַמֻּדָ֣יו וַאֲדָנָ֑יו וְכׇ֨ל־כֵּלָ֔יו וְכֹ֖ל עֲבֹדָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Under their custody shall be the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars, and the pillars and their sockets, and all things that pertain to this kind of service:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän virkansa pitää oleman, vartioida majan lautoja, korennoita, patsaita ja majan jalkoja, ja kaikkia astioita, jotka sen palvelukseen tarvitaan,
verses.king_james: And under the custody and charge of the sons of Merari shall be the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and the sockets thereof, and all the vessels thereof, and all that serveth thereto,

verses.latin_vulgate: columnæque atrii per circuitum cum basibus suis, et paxilli cum funibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַמֻּדֵ֧י הֶחָצֵ֛ר סָבִ֖יב וְאַדְנֵיהֶ֑ם וִיתֵדֹתָ֖ם וּמֵֽיתְרֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the pillars of the court round about with their sockets, and the pins with their cords.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös patsaita pihan ympärillä, ja sen jalkoja, ynnä paanuin ja köytten kanssa.
verses.king_james: And the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords.

verses.latin_vulgate: Castrametabuntur ante tabernaculum fœderis, id est, ad orientalem plagam, Moyses et Aaron cum filiis suis, habentes custodiam sanctuarii in medio filiorum Israël. Quisquis alienus accesserit, morietur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַחֹנִ֣ים לִפְנֵ֣י הַמִּשְׁכָּ֡ן קֵ֣דְמָה לִפְנֵי֩ אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵ֨ד ׀ מִזְרָ֜חָה מֹשֶׁ֣ה ׀ וְאַהֲרֹ֣ן וּבָנָ֗יו שֹֽׁמְרִים֙ מִשְׁמֶ֣רֶת הַמִּקְדָּ֔שׁ לְמִשְׁמֶ֖רֶת בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְהַזָּ֥ר הַקָּרֵ֖ב יוּמָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Before the tabernacle of the covenant, that is to say on the east side shall Moses and Aaron camp, with their sons, having the custody of the sanctuary, in the midst of the children of Israel. What stranger soever cometh unto it, shall be put to death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta seurakunnan majan etiselle puolelle itään päin pitää Moses ja Aaron ja hänen poikansa heitänsä sioittaman, ja vartioitseman pyhän vartioita Israelin lasten puolesta. Jos joku muukalainen siihen lähestyy, sen pitää kuoleman.
verses.king_james: But those that encamp before the tabernacle toward the east, even before the tabernacle of the congregation eastward, shall be Moses, and Aaron and his sons, keeping the charge of the sanctuary for the charge of the children of Israel; and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes Levitæ, quos numeraverunt Moyses et Aaron juxta præceptum Domini per familias suas in genere masculino a mense uno et supra, fuerunt viginti duo millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־פְּקוּדֵ֨י הַלְוִיִּ֜ם אֲשֶׁר֩ פָּקַ֨ד מֹשֶׁ֧ה וְׄאַׄהֲׄרֹ֛ׄןׄ עַל־פִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם כׇּל־זָכָר֙ מִבֶּן־חֹ֣דֶשׁ וָמַ֔עְלָה שְׁנַ֥יִם וְעֶשְׂרִ֖ים אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: All the Levites, that I Moses and Aaron numbered according to the precept of the Lord, by their f families, of the male kind from one month and upward, were twenty-two thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikkein Leviläisten luku, jotka Moses ja Aaron lukivat, heidän sukukunnissansa Herran sanan jälkeen, kaikki miehenpuoli, kuukauden vanha ja sen ylitse, oli kaksikolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: All that were numbered of the Levites, which Moses and Aaron numbered at the commandment of the Lord, throughout their families, all the males from a month old and upward, were twenty and two thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Dominus ad Moysen : Numera primogenitos sexus masculini de filiis Israël ab uno mense et supra, et habebis summam eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֗ה פְּקֹ֨ד כׇּל־בְּכֹ֤ר זָכָר֙ לִבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מִבֶּן־חֹ֖דֶשׁ וָמָ֑עְלָה וְשָׂ֕א אֵ֖ת מִסְפַּ֥ר שְׁמֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Moses: Number the firstborn of the male sex of the children of Israel, from one month and upward, and thou shalt take the sum of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle: lue kaikki esikoiset, jotka miehenpuolet ovat Israelin lasten seassa, kuukauden vanhat ja sen ylitse, ja ota heidän nimeinsä luku.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Number all the firstborn of the males of the children of Israel from a month old and upward, and take the number of their names.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tollesque Levitas mihi pro omni primogenito filiorum Israël : ego sum Dominus : et pecora eorum pro universis primogenitis pecorum filiorum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַחְתָּ֨ אֶת־הַלְוִיִּ֥ם לִי֙ אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה תַּ֥חַת כׇּל־בְּכֹ֖ר בִּבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְאֵת֙ בֶּהֱמַ֣ת הַלְוִיִּ֔ם תַּ֣חַת כׇּל־בְּכ֔וֹר בְּבֶהֱמַ֖ת בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt take the Levites to me for all the firstborn of the children of Israel, I am the Lord: and their cattle for all the firstborn of the cattle of the children of Israel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinun pitää ottaman Leviläiset minulle, minä Herra, kaikkein Israelin lasten esikoisten edestä, ja Leviläisten karjat, kaikkein Israelin lasten karjan esikoisten edestä.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt take the Levites for me (I am the Lord) instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel; and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstlings among the cattle of the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Recensuit Moyses, sicut præceperat Dominus, primogenitos filiorum Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְקֹ֣ד מֹשֶׁ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֹת֑וֹ אֶֽת־כׇּל־בְּכ֖וֹר בִּבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses reckoned up, as the Lord had commanded, the firstborn of the children of Israel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses luki, niinkuin Herra hänelle käskenyt oli, kaikki Israelin lasten esikoiset.
verses.king_james: And Moses numbered, as the Lord commanded him, all the firstborn among the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: et fuerunt masculi per nomina sua, a mense uno et supra, viginti duo millia ducenti septuaginta tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִי֩ כׇל־בְּכ֨וֹר זָכָ֜ר בְּמִסְפַּ֥ר שֵׁמֹ֛ת מִבֶּן־חֹ֥דֶשׁ וָמַ֖עְלָה לִפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם שְׁנַ֤יִם וְעֶשְׂרִים֙ אֶ֔לֶף שְׁלֹשָׁ֥ה וְשִׁבְעִ֖ים וּמָאתָֽיִם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the males by their names, from one month and upward, were twenty-two thousand two hundred and seventy-three.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olivat kaikki miehiset esikoiset, heidän nimeinsä luvun jälkeen, kuukauden vanhat ja sen ylitse luetut, kaksikolmattakymmentä tuhatta, kaksisataa ja kolmekahdeksattakymmentä.
verses.king_james: And all the firstborn males by the number of names, from a month old and upward, of those that were numbered of them, were twenty and two thousand two hundred and threescore and thirteen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Tolle Levitas pro primogenitis filiorum Israël, et pecora Levitarum pro pecoribus eorum, eruntque Levitæ mei. Ego sum Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קַ֣ח אֶת־הַלְוִיִּ֗ם תַּ֤חַת כׇּל־בְּכוֹר֙ בִּבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְאֶת־בֶּהֱמַ֥ת הַלְוִיִּ֖ם תַּ֣חַת בְּהֶמְתָּ֑ם וְהָיוּ־לִ֥י הַלְוִיִּ֖ם אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take the Levites for the firstborn of the children of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites for their cattle, and the Levites shall be mine. I am the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ota Leviläiset kaikkein Israelin lasten esikoisten edestä, ja Leviläisten karja heidän karjansa edestä: ja Leviläisten pitää oleman minun, minä olen Herra.
verses.king_james: Take the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle; and the Levites shall be mine: I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: In pretio autem ducentorum septuaginta trium, qui excedunt numerum Levitarum de primogenitis filiorum Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵת֙ פְּדוּיֵ֣י הַשְּׁלֹשָׁ֔ה וְהַשִּׁבְעִ֖ים וְהַמָּאתָ֑יִם הָעֹֽדְפִים֙ עַל־הַלְוִיִּ֔ם מִבְּכ֖וֹר בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But for the price of the two hundred and seventy-three, of the firstborn of the children of Israel, that exceed the number of the Levites,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta lunastuksen niiden kahdensadan ja kolmenkahdeksattakymmenen edestä, jotka jäävät Israelin lasten esikoisista Leviläisten luvun ylitse,
verses.king_james: And for those that are to be redeemed of the two hundred and threescore and thirteen of the firstborn of the children of Israel, which are more than the Levites;

verses.latin_vulgate: accipies quinque siclos per singula capita ad mensuram sanctuarii (siclus habet viginti obolos) :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַחְתָּ֗ חֲמֵ֧שֶׁת חֲמֵ֛שֶׁת שְׁקָלִ֖ים לַגֻּלְגֹּ֑לֶת בְּשֶׁ֤קֶל הַקֹּ֙דֶשׁ֙ תִּקָּ֔ח עֶשְׂרִ֥ים גֵּרָ֖ה הַשָּֽׁקֶל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt take five sicles for every bead, according to the weight of the sanctuary. A sicle hath twenty obols.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pitää sinun ottaman viisi sikliä joka hengeltä: pyhän siklin jälkeen pitää sinun sen ottaman; sikli maksaa kaksikymmentä geraa.
verses.king_james: Thou shalt even take five shekels apiece by the poll, after the shekel of the sanctuary shalt thou take them: (the shekel is twenty gerahs:)

verses.latin_vulgate: dabisque pecuniam Aaron et filiis ejus pretium eorum qui supra sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתָּ֣ה הַכֶּ֔סֶף לְאַהֲרֹ֖ן וּלְבָנָ֑יו פְּדוּיֵ֕י הָעֹדְפִ֖ים בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt give the money to Aaron and his sons, the price of them that are above.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinun pitää antaman rahan Aaronille ja hänen pojillensa, lunastettuin edestä, jotka ylitse olivat.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt give the money, wherewith the odd number of them is to be redeemed, unto Aaron and to his sons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tulit igitur Moyses pecuniam eorum, qui fuerant amplius, et quos redemerant a Levitis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֵ֖ת כֶּ֣סֶף הַפִּדְי֑וֹם מֵאֵת֙ הָעֹ֣דְפִ֔ים עַ֖ל פְּדוּיֵ֥י הַלְוִיִּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses therefore took the money of them that were above, and whom they had redeemed from the Levites,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin otti Moses lunastusrahan niiltä, jotka ylitse olivat Leviläisten lunastetuista.
verses.king_james: And Moses took the redemption money of them that were over and above them that were redeemed by the Levites:

verses.latin_vulgate: pro primogenitis filiorum Israël, mille trecentorum sexaginta quinque siclorum juxta pondus sanctuarii :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵאֵ֗ת בְּכ֛וֹר בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לָקַ֣ח אֶת־הַכָּ֑סֶף חֲמִשָּׁ֨ה וְשִׁשִּׁ֜ים וּשְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֛וֹת וָאֶ֖לֶף בְּשֶׁ֥קֶל הַקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the firstborn of the children of Israel, one thousand three hundred and sixty-five sicles, according to the weight of the sanctuary,
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelin lasten esikoisilta otti hän rahan, tuhannen kolmesataa ja viisiseitsemättäkymmentä sikliä: pyhän siklin jälkeen.
verses.king_james: Of the firstborn of the children of Israel took he the money; a thousand three hundred and threescore and five shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dedit eam Aaron et filiis ejus juxta verbum quod præceperat sibi Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֨ן מֹשֶׁ֜ה אֶת־כֶּ֧סֶף הַפְּדֻיִ֛ם לְאַהֲרֹ֥ן וּלְבָנָ֖יו עַל־פִּ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And gave it to Aaron and his sons according to the word that the Lord had commanded him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses antoi lunastusrahan Aaronille ja hänen pojillensa Herran sanan jälkeen, niinkuin Herra oli Mosekselle käskenyt.
verses.king_james: And Moses gave the money of them that were redeemed unto Aaron and to his sons, according to the word of the Lord, as the Lord commanded Moses.
